comment: Desired Airtable schema, applied additively by apply-schema.js (Meta API cannot delete tables/fields or change field types — removals are manual). Tables and fields are matched by id when present, so a UI rename surfaces as a drift warning instead of a duplicate field; run airtable/import-schema.js to backfill ids and snapshot drift.

tables.name: RawEmails
tables.description: Queue of regex-cleaned job-alert emails, populated by apps-script/gmail-collector.gs. Claude's screening pipeline reads Status=New rows and flips them to Processed. Mirrors the Make.com Sheets columns A-M.

fields.name: CleanText
fields.description: Regex-cleaned body; truncated only at Airtable's 100k long-text limit

tables.name: Vacancies
tables.description: Tracked DevOps/Platform job vacancies (Status=Applied or Skipped). The screening pipeline's decisions store — read at run start as the §0 skip-list, written at run end. Skipped rows within 30 days of Date are skipped from re-screening; older Skipped rows are re-evaluated.

fields.name: Date
fields.description: Date applied (Applied) or date reviewed (Skipped). Drives the 30-day skip window.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Reason not applied, applied status, or match notes

fields.name: Link
fields.description: Best available direct link to the listing
